response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source contributions, but lacks explicit evidence of people management experience and mobile platform expertise, which are core to the role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven technical leadership via open-source projects and educational workshops
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and systems programming with strong testing focus
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Limited demonstration of mobile platform ecosystem experience (iOS/Android)
Role history emphasizes individual contributor work over organizational change or roadmap ownership
